case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. ZS EXPRESS LLC ET AL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75233905) AS TO DEFENDANT ZS EXPRESS LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZS EXPRESS LLC $25,328.16 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,012.60 INTEREST, $420.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,586.51, SEE SCANNED DOC
